# .github

This directory holds GitHub-specific metadata for the **sites-reviews-docs** repository.

- This repo is **documentation**, licensed under [CC BY 4.0](../LICENSE) (not a code license).
- Issues and pull requests for the **code surfaces** belong in their own repos:
  - [sites-reviews-extension](https://github.com/SitesReviewsTrust/sites-reviews-extension) — browser extension
  - [sites-reviews-mcp](https://github.com/SitesReviewsTrust/sites-reviews-mcp) — MCP server
  - [sites-reviews-api](https://github.com/SitesReviewsTrust/sites-reviews-api) — API & widgets
- For docs contributions, see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

All repositories: https://github.com/orgs/SitesReviewsTrust/repositories
